---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the sample
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What pain point or limitation are you running into? Describe the user need or scenario.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Include any specifics about model behavior, UI, AWS services, or deployment options if relevant.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about and why this one is preferred.

**Additional context**
Links to AWS documentation, screenshots, related issues, or other context that helps explain the request.
